headline: Kinder Morgan Inc. (NYSE:KMI) Delivers Strong Earnings Beat as Quality Growth Stock Cranks Up 2026 Outlook
summary: Kinder Morgan (KMI) crushed Q2 2026 earnings with EPS of $0.37 and revenue of $4.477B, both beating estimates. The company raised its full-year outlook, now expecting over $1.52 EPS and record net income.

raw.headline: Kinder Morgan Inc. (NYSE:KMI) Delivers Strong Earnings Beat as Quality Growth Stock Cranks Up 2026 Outlook

headline: Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) Reports Upbeat Q2 CY2026
summary: Energy infrastructure company Kinder Morgan (NYSE:KMI) announced better-than-expected revenue in Q2 CY2026, with sales up 10.8% year on year to $4.48 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $0.37 per share was 18.3% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Kinder Morgan Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
summary: HOUSTON, July 22, 2026--Kinder Morgan Reports Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results. Achieves Record Second Quarter Net Income and Adjusted EBITDA.

headline: Macro Tailwinds Power A Strong First Half For Midstream
summary: Amid major swings in oil and equities, MLPs and midstream outperformed the S&P 500 and kept pace with the energy benchmark in H1 '26. Midstream names also largely beat Q1 earnings estimates.
